description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline featuring both gable and hip elements, as well as a small turret. The front facade is adorned with a covered porch supported by columns, and there are multiple large windows, including bay and arched styles, providing ample natural light. The house is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs, and features a decorative white fence along the front garden. On one side, there is a spacious outdoor patio area with a swimming pool enclosed by a railing, offering a recreational space. The rear and side elevations reveal additional balconies and a mix of window shapes, contributing to the house's architectural richness. The overall design blends traditional and Victorian influences, with brick as the dominant exterior material and white trim accents.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a covered front porch, turret, multiple large windows, and a backyard pool area. The design features traditional and Victorian elements, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, columns, bay windows, turret, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the turret, side balcony, and the transition to the backyard pool area with railing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious pool area, back patio, and multiple windows along the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, turret, and additional landscaping, with the pool area visible to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay and arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, decorative trim, and a prominent main door
